Experience the ultimate image transformation tool with our versatile Image Converter app. Seamlessly convert a wide range of image formats, including JPG, PNG, JPEG, GIF, PDF, WebP, and BMP, all in one convenient application. Whether you need to compress high-resolution images, switch formats for compatibility, or create versatile images for web use, our app has you covered.
 
Enjoy the benefits of bulk image conversion, allowing you to process multiple images simultaneously, saving you time and effort. Our app ensures high-quality conversions with a user-friendly interface, making it suitable for both novice and experienced users.
 
Key Features:
 
Convert images from and to popular formats, including JPG, PNG, JPEG, GIF, PDF, WebP, and BMP.
Bulk image conversion for efficient processing.
Maintain image quality with high-resolution conversions.
Streamlined, easy-to-use interface for a hassle-free experience.
Save time and storage space by optimizing your image collection.
But that's not all! We also offer seamless sharing options, allowing you to instantly send your converted images to friends, family, or colleagues. Easily share your masterpieces via email, messaging apps, or social media with just a few taps.
 
Enhance your image management and sharing experience by downloading our Image Converter app today. It's the all-in-one solution for your image format conversion and sharing needs.

cn.description:
Why RPGEmu not others?
1.SwiftUI design, to play or not to play the RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP games is easier than ever
2.Support to add your own Windows PC MV/MZ/XP game.zip into the app, that means you could enjoy your own  MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices
3.Virtual keyboard, sometimes it is not a plus but a must, if you want to go on playing the visual novels

Note:
The app includes 3 demo games, 1 is MV Demo, 1 is MZ Demo, 1 is XP Demo, once you installed the app, you could play MV/MZ/XP game files on your iOS devices then.
Demo games are just for demonstrating the app's function is ok which it could play MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices, for example, press 'ESC" key, you could save the game.
You could check the tutorial page to add your own game.zip into the app if you want to enjoy your own MV/MZ/XP games on iOS.
Please do not expect for the bundled games will be wonderful, they are very basic for demonstrating the app's ability only.

Most of MV/MZ/XP games should be ok to play with this app, if it does not, let me know.
RPG maker MV/MZ/XP is game framework, so one is ok, another is ok too, as both of them are made with the same tool.
Maybe you have encountered such situation:
When you downloaded a wonderful Visual Novel game from website, you do not want to play it on your windows pc, while you want to play it on your iPhone or iPad.
If the visual novel game is made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP, you are good to go with this app then.
RPGEmu gives your a new chance to play those windows games which made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP tool on your iPhone or iPad.
Though RPGEmu itself does not supply any games, it is not very hard to get "RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP Games".

Maybe you have many those game titles on your desktop PC already, just transfer the archive file to "Files App", then you can use RPGEmu load those titles and play them on the go.

If you could play those games on your windows pc, it should be ok to play them on your iPhone or iPad.

I noted such kind of visual novel games do heavily depends on keyboard, so I made a virtual keyboard.
Notes: when you see "Press Z to start", you could press "Enter" to start also.

RPGEmu also supports RPG Maker MZ game and RPG Maker XP game, Note here RPGEmu tagged [XP Game] indeed includes RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games, as they are all written used Ruby, we just tagged it as [XP Game].

The game was made with RPG Maker MV tool, we call it RPG Maker MV game, or [MV Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker MZ tool, we call it RPG Maker MZ game, or [MZ Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX tool, we call it RPG Maker XP game, or [XP Game].

Once you installed RPGEmu, you have the ability to play windows [MV Game] / [MZ Game] / [XP Game] on your iPhone or iPad.

Note:
When you imported the game zip file, the transfer process may need minutes to finish, please do not leave the app RPGEmu, or else, transfer process will be terminated and app will crash.
Do not leave screen that means you should not go to Home Screen or open another APP, you must keep you are on the RPGEmu's screen.
Of course, if you have to open another app, that's ok, just open the RPGEmu again, and start to transfer the game zip file from beginning again.
This behavior is not a BUG, hope you could understand it.
After transfer process finished, you could leave RPGEmu and back to RPGEmu, only when the file is in transferring, you could not leave RPGEmu.
cn.releaseNotes:
fixes some known issues.
add keyboard input for XP games, when game require you input with system keyboard, just press "...", "Show/Hide[keyboard]" will launch keyboard or hide keyboard.
added some patches for ruby 1.8
kindly note, RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games are all tagged as "XP Game" in RPGEmu, as they are all written used Ruby.

cn.description:
【核心特色：这就是你从未体验过的江湖】

1.  “移动端发货”：独属于你的无缝武侠大世界，真实武林画卷
       无读条世界：告别加载画面！我们打造了一个面积达256丈的无缝大世界——中原、江南、西域、南疆……从熙熙攘攘的古城街区，到人迹罕至的雪山秘境，所有场景皆可自由探索。
       活的江湖：昼夜、真实天气、万物动态（可破坏环境、可拾取万物）。世界不仅仅是背景，更是可交互的阶段。
       无束缚体验：轻功飞跃山河，踏波而行，攀爬峭壁。你的武侠梦，不再受束缚。

（我们的核心是创造一个‘无界’的武侠世界。在这里，地图没有空气墙，探索没有读条，整个世界是连贯、可交互、充满生机的）

2.  “第一代最受欢迎的玩法”：千种武学心法，自由搭配的武侠战斗
       没有僵化的“职业”限制！我们提供了超过数百种内功、外功、轻功、技艺。你可以是刀剑双绝的豪侠，也可以是精通音律、以琴音伤人的雅士，甚至是暗器毒术无双的“邪派”高手。
       武学招式不再是一成不变的关键循环。采用我们“无规则”战斗系统，所有的招式心苦自由搭配、组合，你自己的套路。是追求一击必杀的极限爆发，还是决定组建全场连绵不绝的控制？战斗的策略与乐趣，完全交由你。

3.  “你的江湖”：高自由度的人生，你的选择就是规则
       江湖不是非黑即白。你的每一个抉择都会引发难以想象的“因果链”。救下一个路人，他可能就是你未来宗门的引荐人；偷听一桩秘密，或许会让你卷入颠覆王朝的阴谋。
       可以选择拜入名门正派的恪守门规，也可以加入诡谲魔教随心所欲，更可以做个散人，逍遥自在。甚至可以完全抛开打杀，成为一名富甲天下的商贾、巧夺天工的匠人，也可以悬壶济世的神医。这个世界，认可你的每一种活法。

4.  “多达700万字的文本内容，庞大的玩法量级”：沙盒奇遇，要素隐藏线索
       《下一站江湖Ⅱ》的世界是“活”的。NPC们有自己的生活记录和喜怒哀乐。你可能在悬崖下发现前辈遗骸，学到失传绝学；也可能一碗酒，结交到一位隐世高人。
       大量未在任务列表中标记的“奇遇”事件散落在世界各个角落。探索的回报远超你的想象，真正的宝藏，永远献给最好奇的旅人。

5.  “市井百业，多维度沉浸身份”：技艺百态，感受江湖的烟火气
       江湖不止有武功。我们深入嵌入了当今同类生活技能：采矿、采药、锻造、制琴、象棋、书法、绘画、厨艺……这些不仅仅是赚钱的手段，更是提升角色、解锁特殊剧情和关卡能力的关键。一门技艺的技能，也能让你名动江湖。

【故事背景：游戏基础框架】（持续更新）
700万文字庞大世界观：战国末期，三国、百家、江湖！

1.  角色扮演：
① 多出身多结局，每个主角都是全新体验（当前已将门之子、富家千金、寒门书生、江湖浪子、无名小卒等五大身出300多万字主线剧情接近20个结局）

2.  市井身份：
① 皈依各器皿特色的城井身份独特的对应独立剧情、规则玩法。比如刺客对应青衣楼的门玩法派、以及相关的物品万字独立剧情，突出的悬赏及刺杀玩法等

3.  江湖霸图：模拟经营、骑砍LIKE、世界建造
① 物品可加入各具特色的门派
② 每个派都有自己的独立剧情以及与其他门派的恩怨，比如狂刀门和绝剑门的火烧凌云窟大型剧情
③ 每个门派都有自己突出的突出体系，以及规则：比如少林的从扫地僧至罗汉堂首座，敲钟玩法及铜人阵
④ 每个门派都强调自己的武学、心法体系
⑤ 每个门派都可以模拟经营、占领大世界的比如矿山青楼，并开启对应的经营
⑥ 每个门派都一样骑马与砍杀一样的世界争霸

4.  自由成长：习百家武学，走你自己的江湖

cn.description:
风光摄影助手Pro 帮助摄影师理解并预判风光摄影中时间、光线与天象之间的关系。

每一张令人难忘的风光照片，背后都是时间、光线与天象的共同作用。真正的难点，往往不在于拍摄技巧，而在于：是否在正确的时间，站在了正确的方向上。

风光摄影助手Pro 正是为此而生。
它是一套帮助你理解光线节奏与天象变化的摄影规划工具，让你在出发之前，就能对拍摄时机做到心中有数。

你可以通过时间轴查看太阳、月亮与银河的位置变化，理解它们在一天中的运行节奏。3D 指南针以直观的方式呈现天体方向与高度，让光线不再只是抽象的数据，而是清晰可感知的空间关系。

在 AR 模式 下，你可以提前看到太阳、月亮和银河在真实环境中的位置，理解它们与地形、建筑之间的相对关系。应用还会清晰展示日出、日落、金色时刻、蓝色时刻、天文薄暮等重要星历信息，并支持将关键时刻添加到系统日历，方便提前规划出行。

风光摄影助手Pro 提供 无限制时间轴，可以预测任意日期、任意时刻的天体位置。同时还提供完整的 AR 创作工具，包括星轨模拟、取景器模拟、日月搜索、山峰识别以及彗星位置预测。

应用还提供完整的 地图规划能力，可以在地图上对任意地点进行预测，结合光污染地图与天气信息，提前判断是否值得出发，并保存和加载常用机位。

此外，风光摄影助手Pro 提供专业级的 3D VR 地形预测系统。
它基于真实地形数据进行计算，不依赖现场传感器，可在任何时间、任何地点稳定模拟山峰遮挡、天体路径与相机视野，帮助你在出发之前就完成构图判断。

在此基础上，应用还支持 无人机模拟构图功能。
你可以在真实地形的 3D 场景中模拟无人机飞行高度与镜头视角，提前验证航拍构图是否成立。

系统会实时显示无人机的真实离地高度（AGL）以及与目标构图点的水平距离等关键参数，辅助判断飞行高度风险与续航可行性。在飞行高度受到严格限制的环境下，该功能可以帮助你在规划阶段提前评估构图与飞行条件的匹配程度。

本功能仅用于构图与高度判断，不涉及适飞区、管制区或空域合规性的判定。

同时，系统内置常见民用无人机型号与镜头参数数据库，使模拟结果更贴近真实设备表现。

最新版本还引入了 建筑对齐规划系统。
应用内置了数十种常见建筑模型，你可以将它们摆放到地图上的任意位置，并按照真实尺寸进行缩放和旋转，从而在 VR 场景与无人机模拟场景中规划太阳、月亮或银河与建筑之间的精确对齐构图。

应用同时支持导入 .obj 格式的自定义 3D 模型。
你可以将自己的建筑或地标模型导入 App，与内置模型一起使用，让拍摄规划不再局限于系统预设的场景。

风光摄影助手Pro 不只是一个展示数据的工具，更是一个帮助摄影师做判断的工具。

无论是地面机位还是空中机位，它都帮助你在出发之前完成空间推演。

它让你在拍摄之前更清楚自己在等待什么，在现场更加从容，在创作中更加高效。

让风景的美，不再只依赖运气，而是建立在充分准备之上。

hk.releaseNotes:
fixes some known issues.
add keyboard input for XP games, when game require you input with system keyboard, just press "...", "Show/Hide[keyboard]" will launch keyboard or hide keyboard.
added some patches for ruby 1.8
kindly note, RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games are all tagged as "XP Game" in RPGEmu, as they are all written used Ruby.
hk.description:
Why RPGEmu not others?
1.SwiftUI design, to play or not to play the RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP games is easier than ever
2.Support to add your own Windows PC MV/MZ/XP game.zip into the app, that means you could enjoy your own  MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices
3.Virtual keyboard, sometimes it is not a plus but a must, if you want to go on playing the visual novels

Note:
The app includes 3 demo games, 1 is MV Demo, 1 is MZ Demo, 1 is XP Demo, once you installed the app, you could play MV/MZ/XP game files on your iOS devices then.
Demo games are just for demonstrating the app's function is ok which it could play MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices, for example, press 'ESC" key, you could save the game.
You could check the tutorial page to add your own game.zip into the app if you want to enjoy your own MV/MZ/XP games on iOS.
Please do not expect for the bundled games will be wonderful, they are very basic for demonstrating the app's ability only.

Most of MV/MZ/XP games should be ok to play with this app, if it does not, let me know.
RPG maker MV/MZ/XP is game framework, so one is ok, another is ok too, as both of them are made with the same tool.
Maybe you have encountered such situation:
When you downloaded a wonderful Visual Novel game from website, you do not want to play it on your windows pc, while you want to play it on your iPhone or iPad.
If the visual novel game is made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP, you are good to go with this app then.
RPGEmu gives your a new chance to play those windows games which made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP tool on your iPhone or iPad.
Though RPGEmu itself does not supply any games, it is not very hard to get "RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP Games".

Maybe you have many those game titles on your desktop PC already, just transfer the archive file to "Files App", then you can use RPGEmu load those titles and play them on the go.

If you could play those games on your windows pc, it should be ok to play them on your iPhone or iPad.

I noted such kind of visual novel games do heavily depends on keyboard, so I made a virtual keyboard.
Notes: when you see "Press Z to start", you could press "Enter" to start also.

RPGEmu also supports RPG Maker MZ game and RPG Maker XP game, Note here RPGEmu tagged [XP Game] indeed includes RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games, as they are all written used Ruby, we just tagged it as [XP Game].

The game was made with RPG Maker MV tool, we call it RPG Maker MV game, or [MV Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker MZ tool, we call it RPG Maker MZ game, or [MZ Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX tool, we call it RPG Maker XP game, or [XP Game].

Once you installed RPGEmu, you have the ability to play windows [MV Game] / [MZ Game] / [XP Game] on your iPhone or iPad.

Note:
When you imported the game zip file, the transfer process may need minutes to finish, please do not leave the app RPGEmu, or else, transfer process will be terminated and app will crash.
Do not leave screen that means you should not go to Home Screen or open another APP, you must keep you are on the RPGEmu's screen.
Of course, if you have to open another app, that's ok, just open the RPGEmu again, and start to transfer the game zip file from beginning again.
This behavior is not a BUG, hope you could understand it.
After transfer process finished, you could leave RPGEmu and back to RPGEmu, only when the file is in transferring, you could not leave RPGEmu.

hk.releaseNotes: 快來加入偵探皮埃爾的冒險之旅吧！
hk.description:
《迷宮大偵探》改編自日本IC4Design大熱插圖繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，由法國Darjeeling工作室研發完成，是一款老少皆宜的冒險解謎遊戲。本作採用獨特有趣的繪本畫風，帶你跟隨大偵探皮埃爾的腳步，穿梭於或熱鬧非凡、或變幻莫測的奇妙迷宮世界中，和豐富的人與物進行互動，尋找散佈在各個角落的隱藏線索，探索最終出口，直到解開所有謎題。

【劇情簡介】
著名的迷宮大偵探皮埃爾先生最近又有新案子了。收藏於歌劇市博物館的迷宮石被江洋大盜X先生偷走了！ 這東西會將整個城市變成一個巨大的迷宮，這注定會釀造一場悲劇。為了尋回丟失的迷宮石，皮埃爾已經踏上了抓捕X先生的道路。繞過層層阻礙，穿過艱難險阻，大偵探勢在必得！

【遊戲介紹】
在尋回寶石的旅途中，你將遇到許多有趣古怪的角色，穿過細節滿滿的文化博物館、南法風情的遺忘之都、浪漫的熱氣球城堡······抽絲剝繭挖掘支線故事的層層細節，瞭解整歌劇城。 或許你會問「這的確是個精美可愛的解謎遊戲，但挑戰性在哪呢？」好問題！在迷宮中，雖然只有一條正確的路可以通向出口，但卻有著數不清的路徑，部分會包含隱藏的寶藏和有趣的小遊戲。探索時請務必多多觀察，你一定會收穫意想不到的驚喜。

【遊戲特點】
- 探索巨型迷宮城
改編於IC4Design大熱兒童繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，精緻的童趣手繪畫風帶你進入錯綜複雜、充滿細節的多彩世界
 
- 互動細節滿滿
500+個互動點，內設豐富的文化元素及遊戲梗
 
- 地圖暗藏玄機
超過100個收集物件及隱藏解謎，10張地圖風格各異
 
- 沉浸式聽覺
原創音樂，帶你夢回童趣世界
 
- 獨特故事
故事劇情撲朔迷離，體驗追蹤嫌犯找回寶石的全過程和破解趣味謎題的樂趣
 
- 多語言支持
支持簡繁中文、英語、法語、德語、日語、俄語、西班牙語、義大利語、韓語等10種語言

極限運動新嘗試
- 隨機產生的地圖:每次挑戰都有全新的跳台、斜坡和急降地形等著你
- 自由式操控體驗:玩家可以控制騎手的任何細微動作，遊戲的深度物理系統可將這些操作化為一次次漂亮的特技動作

hk.trackName: 風光攝影助手Pro:風光攝影計劃好幫手
hk.description:
風光攝影助手Pro 幫助攝影師理解並預判風光攝影中時間、光線與天象之間的關係。

在每一張令人難忘的風光照片背後，都存在著時間、光線與天體運動之間的精準對齊。
真正的挑戰往往不在於按下快門，而是在正確的時間，站在正確的位置，面向正確的方向。

風光攝影助手Pro 的設計目的，就是幫助你理解並預判這些自然節律。
它是一款攝影規劃工具，讓你在出發之前就能評估光線與天體條件，使每一次拍攝都建立在清晰判斷之上，而不是憑運氣等待。

你可以透過時間軸預覽太陽、月亮與銀河在一天中的位置變化。3D 指南針會以直觀的方式顯示它們在空間中的方位與高度，使光線行為不再只是抽象數據。

在 AR 模式 中，你可以在真實環境中預覽太陽、月亮與銀河的未來位置，理解它們與地形及周圍環境的對齊關係。
App 同時清楚顯示重要的天文事件，例如日出、日落、黃金時刻、藍調時刻與各種曙暮光階段，並可將關鍵時間加入系統行事曆以獲得提醒。

風光攝影助手Pro 提供 無限制時間軸，可以預測任何日期與時間的天體位置。同時還提供完整的 AR 創作工具，包括星軌模擬、虛擬取景器預覽、太陽與月亮搜尋、山峰識別以及彗星位置預測。

應用還提供完整的 地圖規劃能力，讓你能在地圖上預測任何位置的拍攝條件，查看光害地圖與天氣預報，並保存與重新載入常用拍攝地點。

此外，風光攝影助手Pro 提供專業級的 3D VR 地形預測系統。
它基於真實高程資料構建，不依賴現場感測器，因此可以在任何地點與時間提供穩定且可重複的預測結果。

你可以模擬地形遮擋、天體運行軌跡以及真實相機視角，幫助你在到達拍攝地之前就確定構圖。

同時，應用也支援在同一套真實 3D 地形環境中進行 無人機構圖模擬。

你可以在起飛前模擬無人機的飛行高度與鏡頭視角，驗證航拍構圖是否可行。

系統會顯示真實的 AGL（Above Ground Level）高度以及與拍攝目標點的水平距離，幫助你在規劃階段評估高度限制與飛行可行性。
此功能僅用於構圖規劃與高度參考，並不判斷空域合法性或禁飛區。

內建的無人機資料庫包含常見消費級機型與相機參數，使模擬結果更接近真實設備表現。

最新版本還引入了 建築對齊規劃系統。

你可以在地圖上放置內建的建築模型，並調整其真實尺寸與方向，從而在 VR 與無人機模擬場景中規劃天體與建築之間的精確對齊構圖。

應用同時支援匯入 .obj 格式的自訂 3D 模型，讓你可以加入自己的地標並用於拍攝規劃。

風光攝影助手Pro 不僅是一個查看資訊的工具，更是一個幫助你做出拍攝決策的工具。

無論是地面機位還是空中機位，它都幫助你在出發之前完成空間推演。

它讓你在拍攝之前更有信心，在現場更加從容，在創作時更加高效。

讓偉大的照片來自準備，而不是偶然。

Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese.

Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”.

mo.releaseNotes:
fixes some known issues.
add keyboard input for XP games, when game require you input with system keyboard, just press "...", "Show/Hide[keyboard]" will launch keyboard or hide keyboard.
added some patches for ruby 1.8
kindly note, RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games are all tagged as "XP Game" in RPGEmu, as they are all written used Ruby.
mo.description:
Why RPGEmu not others?
1.SwiftUI design, to play or not to play the RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP games is easier than ever
2.Support to add your own Windows PC MV/MZ/XP game.zip into the app, that means you could enjoy your own  MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices
3.Virtual keyboard, sometimes it is not a plus but a must, if you want to go on playing the visual novels

Note:
The app includes 3 demo games, 1 is MV Demo, 1 is MZ Demo, 1 is XP Demo, once you installed the app, you could play MV/MZ/XP game files on your iOS devices then.
Demo games are just for demonstrating the app's function is ok which it could play MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices, for example, press 'ESC" key, you could save the game.
You could check the tutorial page to add your own game.zip into the app if you want to enjoy your own MV/MZ/XP games on iOS.
Please do not expect for the bundled games will be wonderful, they are very basic for demonstrating the app's ability only.

Most of MV/MZ/XP games should be ok to play with this app, if it does not, let me know.
RPG maker MV/MZ/XP is game framework, so one is ok, another is ok too, as both of them are made with the same tool.
Maybe you have encountered such situation:
When you downloaded a wonderful Visual Novel game from website, you do not want to play it on your windows pc, while you want to play it on your iPhone or iPad.
If the visual novel game is made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP, you are good to go with this app then.
RPGEmu gives your a new chance to play those windows games which made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP tool on your iPhone or iPad.
Though RPGEmu itself does not supply any games, it is not very hard to get "RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP Games".

Maybe you have many those game titles on your desktop PC already, just transfer the archive file to "Files App", then you can use RPGEmu load those titles and play them on the go.

If you could play those games on your windows pc, it should be ok to play them on your iPhone or iPad.

I noted such kind of visual novel games do heavily depends on keyboard, so I made a virtual keyboard.
Notes: when you see "Press Z to start", you could press "Enter" to start also.

RPGEmu also supports RPG Maker MZ game and RPG Maker XP game, Note here RPGEmu tagged [XP Game] indeed includes RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games, as they are all written used Ruby, we just tagged it as [XP Game].

The game was made with RPG Maker MV tool, we call it RPG Maker MV game, or [MV Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker MZ tool, we call it RPG Maker MZ game, or [MZ Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX tool, we call it RPG Maker XP game, or [XP Game].

Once you installed RPGEmu, you have the ability to play windows [MV Game] / [MZ Game] / [XP Game] on your iPhone or iPad.

Note:
When you imported the game zip file, the transfer process may need minutes to finish, please do not leave the app RPGEmu, or else, transfer process will be terminated and app will crash.
Do not leave screen that means you should not go to Home Screen or open another APP, you must keep you are on the RPGEmu's screen.
Of course, if you have to open another app, that's ok, just open the RPGEmu again, and start to transfer the game zip file from beginning again.
This behavior is not a BUG, hope you could understand it.
After transfer process finished, you could leave RPGEmu and back to RPGEmu, only when the file is in transferring, you could not leave RPGEmu.

mo.releaseNotes: 快來加入偵探皮埃爾的冒險之旅吧！
mo.description:
《迷宮大偵探》改編自日本IC4Design大熱插圖繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，由法國Darjeeling工作室研發完成，是一款老少皆宜的冒險解謎遊戲。本作採用獨特有趣的繪本畫風，帶你跟隨大偵探皮埃爾的腳步，穿梭於或熱鬧非凡、或變幻莫測的奇妙迷宮世界中，和豐富的人與物進行互動，尋找散佈在各個角落的隱藏線索，探索最終出口，直到解開所有謎題。

【劇情簡介】
著名的迷宮大偵探皮埃爾先生最近又有新案子了。收藏於歌劇市博物館的迷宮石被江洋大盜X先生偷走了！ 這東西會將整個城市變成一個巨大的迷宮，這注定會釀造一場悲劇。為了尋回丟失的迷宮石，皮埃爾已經踏上了抓捕X先生的道路。繞過層層阻礙，穿過艱難險阻，大偵探勢在必得！

【遊戲介紹】
在尋回寶石的旅途中，你將遇到許多有趣古怪的角色，穿過細節滿滿的文化博物館、南法風情的遺忘之都、浪漫的熱氣球城堡······抽絲剝繭挖掘支線故事的層層細節，瞭解整歌劇城。 或許你會問「這的確是個精美可愛的解謎遊戲，但挑戰性在哪呢？」好問題！在迷宮中，雖然只有一條正確的路可以通向出口，但卻有著數不清的路徑，部分會包含隱藏的寶藏和有趣的小遊戲。探索時請務必多多觀察，你一定會收穫意想不到的驚喜。

【遊戲特點】
- 探索巨型迷宮城
改編於IC4Design大熱兒童繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，精緻的童趣手繪畫風帶你進入錯綜複雜、充滿細節的多彩世界
 
- 互動細節滿滿
500+個互動點，內設豐富的文化元素及遊戲梗
 
- 地圖暗藏玄機
超過100個收集物件及隱藏解謎，10張地圖風格各異
 
- 沉浸式聽覺
原創音樂，帶你夢回童趣世界
 
- 獨特故事
故事劇情撲朔迷離，體驗追蹤嫌犯找回寶石的全過程和破解趣味謎題的樂趣
 
- 多語言支持
支持簡繁中文、英語、法語、德語、日語、俄語、西班牙語、義大利語、韓語等10種語言

Stay hydrated! Track your daily water intake with simple tap controls.

mo.description:
在終極駕駛遊樂場中燃燒橡膠並撕碎金屬！

Wreckfest 充滿了升級和自定義選項。無論您是準備使用加固保險槓、防滾架、側面保護裝置等進行下一次拆遷德比，還是使用空氣濾清器、凸輪軸、燃油系統等發動機性能部件為您的汽車進行一場激烈的比賽，Wreckfest 正在成為最好的競技賽車遊戲。

• 獨特的賽車體驗 –只有通過逼真的物理模擬才能實現。見證在高速賽道上瘋狂的並駕齊驅，在充滿交叉路口和迎面而來的車輛的瘋狂賽道上面臨徹底的破壞瘋狂，或者在德比賽場上大獲全勝。

• 很棒的汽車—— 我們的汽車很舊，被撞壞了，被拼湊在一起......他們散發出風格和個性！從老美國重擊手到敏捷的歐洲人和有趣的亞洲人，你在其他遊戲中找不到這樣的東西。

• 有意義的定制 – 不僅可以改變汽車的外觀，還可以升級它們的防彈衣 – 用重鐵加固它們保護您免受損壞，但也會增加重量，這會影響汽車的操控性。修改您的汽車，以製造堅固的坦克或易碎但閃電般快速的火箭，或介於兩者之間的任何東西！

• 多人遊戲 - 在本地多人遊戲中破壞你的朋友，在追逐爆破優勢的同時將賽車推向極限！

• 挑戰模式 - 與農作物收割機、割草機、校車、三輪車等等一起玩得開心！

• 職業生涯模式 – 爭奪冠軍，賺取經驗，解鎖新的升級和車輛，並成為歷史上的 Wreckfest 冠軍！

Welcome to This Ain’t Even Poker, Ya Joker - a unique incremental idle clicker where you flip cards to earn money, grow your hand, buy new decks, unlock powerful upgrades, discover new cards, and more. Can you defeat the Jester and escape the carnival?

GROW YOUR HAND

ESTABLISH DOMINANCE

GET UPGRADED

You can even unlock missions to destroy cards from your deck that you don't want, to ensure every hand is exactly how you want it.

ASCEND TO GREATNESS
Make a deal with the Jester to start over in exchange for Poker Chips (poker chips? But this ain't even poker...?), use those chips to buy even more powerful upgrades.

ESCAPE THE HOUSE OF CARDS
You're trapped in the Jester's domain, can you manage to defeat him and escape? Or will he keep you there, trapped forever in an endless cycle?

極限運動新嘗試
- 隨機產生的地圖:每次挑戰都有全新的跳台、斜坡和急降地形等著你
- 自由式操控體驗:玩家可以控制騎手的任何細微動作，遊戲的深度物理系統可將這些操作化為一次次漂亮的特技動作
- 風險與獎勵:你需要控制騎手向更高更強的分數和特技連招衝刺，但要保證一定的成功率，否則你會輸掉比賽
- 建立你的名望:完善的線上名望系統讓你可以展現自己的實力，並解鎖新的車型和路線
- 完整授權的音樂:我們與知名的鼓打貝斯音樂公司 Liquicity 合作，為你帶來完美的音樂體驗，陪你一同征服山地賽道
- 成為下一個下坡競速王者:你能一鼓作氣通關整條賽道，達到傳奇下坡競速王者的評價嗎？騎上你的愛車開始挑戰吧！
加入車隊，成為傳奇
在《Descenders》，車隊就是車手的一切。玩家選擇加入一支車隊（Enemy、Arboreal 或 Kinetic）後，就需要與隊友一起面對未知的挑戰。

- Descenders Discord 伺服器將為車隊成員開通專用的車隊頻道

mo.description:
風光攝影助手Pro 幫助攝影師理解並預判風光攝影中時間、光線與天象之間的關係。

在每一張令人難忘的風光照片背後，都存在著時間、光線與天體運動之間的精準對齊。
真正的挑戰往往不在於按下快門，而是在正確的時間，站在正確的位置，面向正確的方向。

風光攝影助手Pro 的設計目的，就是幫助你理解並預判這些自然節律。
它是一款攝影規劃工具，讓你在出發之前就能評估光線與天體條件，使每一次拍攝都建立在清晰判斷之上，而不是憑運氣等待。

你可以透過時間軸預覽太陽、月亮與銀河在一天中的位置變化。3D 指南針會以直觀的方式顯示它們在空間中的方位與高度，使光線行為不再只是抽象數據。

在 AR 模式 中，你可以在真實環境中預覽太陽、月亮與銀河的未來位置，理解它們與地形及周圍環境的對齊關係。
App 同時清楚顯示重要的天文事件，例如日出、日落、黃金時刻、藍調時刻與各種曙暮光階段，並可將關鍵時間加入系統行事曆以獲得提醒。

風光攝影助手Pro 提供 無限制時間軸，可以預測任何日期與時間的天體位置。同時還提供完整的 AR 創作工具，包括星軌模擬、虛擬取景器預覽、太陽與月亮搜尋、山峰識別以及彗星位置預測。

應用還提供完整的 地圖規劃能力，讓你能在地圖上預測任何位置的拍攝條件，查看光害地圖與天氣預報，並保存與重新載入常用拍攝地點。

此外，風光攝影助手Pro 提供專業級的 3D VR 地形預測系統。
它基於真實高程資料構建，不依賴現場感測器，因此可以在任何地點與時間提供穩定且可重複的預測結果。

你可以模擬地形遮擋、天體運行軌跡以及真實相機視角，幫助你在到達拍攝地之前就確定構圖。

同時，應用也支援在同一套真實 3D 地形環境中進行 無人機構圖模擬。

你可以在起飛前模擬無人機的飛行高度與鏡頭視角，驗證航拍構圖是否可行。

系統會顯示真實的 AGL（Above Ground Level）高度以及與拍攝目標點的水平距離，幫助你在規劃階段評估高度限制與飛行可行性。
此功能僅用於構圖規劃與高度參考，並不判斷空域合法性或禁飛區。

內建的無人機資料庫包含常見消費級機型與相機參數，使模擬結果更接近真實設備表現。

最新版本還引入了 建築對齊規劃系統。

你可以在地圖上放置內建的建築模型，並調整其真實尺寸與方向，從而在 VR 與無人機模擬場景中規劃天體與建築之間的精確對齊構圖。

應用同時支援匯入 .obj 格式的自訂 3D 模型，讓你可以加入自己的地標並用於拍攝規劃。

風光攝影助手Pro 不僅是一個查看資訊的工具，更是一個幫助你做出拍攝決策的工具。

無論是地面機位還是空中機位，它都幫助你在出發之前完成空間推演。

它讓你在拍攝之前更有信心，在現場更加從容，在創作時更加高效。

讓偉大的照片來自準備，而不是偶然。

來打造充滿笑容與回憶的美好遊樂園吧！

tw.releaseNotes:
fixes some known issues.
add keyboard input for XP games, when game require you input with system keyboard, just press "...", "Show/Hide[keyboard]" will launch keyboard or hide keyboard.
added some patches for ruby 1.8
kindly note, RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games are all tagged as "XP Game" in RPGEmu, as they are all written used Ruby.
tw.description:
Why RPGEmu not others?
1.SwiftUI design, to play or not to play the RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP games is easier than ever
2.Support to add your own Windows PC MV/MZ/XP game.zip into the app, that means you could enjoy your own  MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices
3.Virtual keyboard, sometimes it is not a plus but a must, if you want to go on playing the visual novels

Note:
The app includes 3 demo games, 1 is MV Demo, 1 is MZ Demo, 1 is XP Demo, once you installed the app, you could play MV/MZ/XP game files on your iOS devices then.
Demo games are just for demonstrating the app's function is ok which it could play MV/MZ/XP games on iOS devices, for example, press 'ESC" key, you could save the game.
You could check the tutorial page to add your own game.zip into the app if you want to enjoy your own MV/MZ/XP games on iOS.
Please do not expect for the bundled games will be wonderful, they are very basic for demonstrating the app's ability only.

Most of MV/MZ/XP games should be ok to play with this app, if it does not, let me know.
RPG maker MV/MZ/XP is game framework, so one is ok, another is ok too, as both of them are made with the same tool.
Maybe you have encountered such situation:
When you downloaded a wonderful Visual Novel game from website, you do not want to play it on your windows pc, while you want to play it on your iPhone or iPad.
If the visual novel game is made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP, you are good to go with this app then.
RPGEmu gives your a new chance to play those windows games which made with RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP tool on your iPhone or iPad.
Though RPGEmu itself does not supply any games, it is not very hard to get "RPG Maker MV/MZ/XP Games".

Maybe you have many those game titles on your desktop PC already, just transfer the archive file to "Files App", then you can use RPGEmu load those titles and play them on the go.

If you could play those games on your windows pc, it should be ok to play them on your iPhone or iPad.

I noted such kind of visual novel games do heavily depends on keyboard, so I made a virtual keyboard.
Notes: when you see "Press Z to start", you could press "Enter" to start also.

RPGEmu also supports RPG Maker MZ game and RPG Maker XP game, Note here RPGEmu tagged [XP Game] indeed includes RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX games, as they are all written used Ruby, we just tagged it as [XP Game].

The game was made with RPG Maker MV tool, we call it RPG Maker MV game, or [MV Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker MZ tool, we call it RPG Maker MZ game, or [MZ Game].
The game was made with RPG Maker XP/VXAce/VX tool, we call it RPG Maker XP game, or [XP Game].

Once you installed RPGEmu, you have the ability to play windows [MV Game] / [MZ Game] / [XP Game] on your iPhone or iPad.

Note:
When you imported the game zip file, the transfer process may need minutes to finish, please do not leave the app RPGEmu, or else, transfer process will be terminated and app will crash.
Do not leave screen that means you should not go to Home Screen or open another APP, you must keep you are on the RPGEmu's screen.
Of course, if you have to open another app, that's ok, just open the RPGEmu again, and start to transfer the game zip file from beginning again.
This behavior is not a BUG, hope you could understand it.
After transfer process finished, you could leave RPGEmu and back to RPGEmu, only when the file is in transferring, you could not leave RPGEmu.

tw.description:
《迷宮大偵探》改編自日本IC4Design大熱插圖繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，由法國Darjeeling工作室研發完成，是一款老少皆宜的冒險解謎遊戲。本作採用獨特有趣的繪本畫風，帶你跟隨大偵探皮埃爾的腳步，穿梭於或熱鬧非凡、或變幻莫測的奇妙迷宮世界中，和豐富的人與物進行互動，尋找散佈在各個角落的隱藏線索，探索最終出口，直到解開所有謎題。

【劇情簡介】
著名的迷宮大偵探皮埃爾先生最近又有新案子了。收藏於歌劇市博物館的迷宮石被江洋大盜X先生偷走了！ 這東西會將整個城市變成一個巨大的迷宮，這注定會釀造一場悲劇。為了尋回丟失的迷宮石，皮埃爾已經踏上了抓捕X先生的道路。繞過層層阻礙，穿過艱難險阻，大偵探勢在必得！

【遊戲介紹】
在尋回寶石的旅途中，你將遇到許多有趣古怪的角色，穿過細節滿滿的文化博物館、南法風情的遺忘之都、浪漫的熱氣球城堡······抽絲剝繭挖掘支線故事的層層細節，瞭解整歌劇城。 或許你會問「這的確是個精美可愛的解謎遊戲，但挑戰性在哪呢？」好問題！在迷宮中，雖然只有一條正確的路可以通向出口，但卻有著數不清的路徑，部分會包含隱藏的寶藏和有趣的小遊戲。探索時請務必多多觀察，你一定會收穫意想不到的驚喜。

【遊戲特點】
- 探索巨型迷宮城
改編於IC4Design大熱兒童繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，精緻的童趣手繪畫風帶你進入錯綜複雜、充滿細節的多彩世界
 
- 互動細節滿滿
500+個互動點，內設豐富的文化元素及遊戲梗
 
- 地圖暗藏玄機
超過100個收集物件及隱藏解謎，10張地圖風格各異
 
- 沉浸式聽覺
原創音樂，帶你夢回童趣世界
 
- 獨特故事

tw.description:
Otter is a simple and beautiful food diary app that helps you track what you eat every day. No calorie counting, no complicated databases – just take photos, add notes, and reflect on your eating habits.

◆ WHY OTTER?

- Clean, minimal design with an adorable otter character
- Photo-based meal tracking – snap and save
- No ads, no distractions
- iCloud sync across all your devices

◆ FEATURES

- Photo Food Journal
Capture your meals with photos. A picture is worth a thousand calories – see what you eat at a glance.

- Daily Notes
Write about your day, how you felt, or what made each meal special.

- Water Tracker
Stay hydrated! Track your daily water intake with simple tap controls.

- Weight Log
Monitor your weight trends over time with easy-to-read records.

- Timeline View
Browse your food history in a beautiful timeline. See patterns in your eating habits.

- Search & Stats
Find past meals quickly and view your eating statistics.

- iCloud Sync
Your food diary stays safe and syncs automatically across iPhone, iPad, and Mac.


◆ A MINDFUL APPROACH TO EATING

Otter doesn't judge. There's no calorie counting or strict diet plans. Just a gentle companion to help you become more aware of what you eat. 

You are what you eat – let Otter help you remember it.

Questions? Contact us at OtterDietDiary@gmail.com

tw.description:
在終極駕駛遊樂場中燃燒橡膠並撕碎金屬！

Wreckfest 充滿了升級和自定義選項。無論您是準備使用加固保險槓、防滾架、側面保護裝置等進行下一次拆遷德比，還是使用空氣濾清器、凸輪軸、燃油系統等發動機性能部件為您的汽車進行一場激烈的比賽，Wreckfest 正在成為最好的競技賽車遊戲。

• 獨特的賽車體驗 –只有通過逼真的物理模擬才能實現。見證在高速賽道上瘋狂的並駕齊驅，在充滿交叉路口和迎面而來的車輛的瘋狂賽道上面臨徹底的破壞瘋狂，或者在德比賽場上大獲全勝。

• 很棒的汽車—— 我們的汽車很舊，被撞壞了，被拼湊在一起......他們散發出風格和個性！從老美國重擊手到敏捷的歐洲人和有趣的亞洲人，你在其他遊戲中找不到這樣的東西。

• 有意義的定制 – 不僅可以改變汽車的外觀，還可以升級它們的防彈衣 – 用重鐵加固它們保護您免受損壞，但也會增加重量，這會影響汽車的操控性。修改您的汽車，以製造堅固的坦克或易碎但閃電般快速的火箭，或介於兩者之間的任何東西！

• 多人遊戲 - 在本地多人遊戲中破壞你的朋友，在追逐爆破優勢的同時將賽車推向極限！

• 挑戰模式 - 與農作物收割機、割草機、校車、三輪車等等一起玩得開心！

• 職業生涯模式 – 爭奪冠軍，賺取經驗，解鎖新的升級和車輛，並成為歷史上的 Wreckfest 冠軍！

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

tw.releaseNotes: 您，可曾幻想過真正主宰一個王朝的命運？這一次，您不再是旁觀者，而是化身主角，進入這部真人互動的宮廷生存影像作品！《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇——全新推出！您將掙脫命運的枷鎖，一步步走上那座象徵至高無上的龍椅。該如何書寫您的盛世天下？一切，由您親手決定！
tw.description:
本作品需全程連線。媚娘篇內容共十六集，女帝篇內容共三十二集，均含免費體驗章節。

您可能從沒體驗過這樣的作品——您當主角，真人互動的宮廷冒險！
《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇全新推出！誠摯邀請您踏上驚險刺激的東方宮廷權謀之旅。

● 承襲《媚娘篇》佳績，再續宮廷傳奇
《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》媚娘篇贏得了廣大用戶的喜愛。
新篇《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇，邀您提前鎖定這場驚心動魄的朝堂博弈，共同期待東方女帝傳奇的登頂新巔峰！

● 4K電影級質感，重塑東方宮廷美學
全程真人演繹、實景打造，結合4K電影級光影調度，匠心重現東方宮闕的恢弘氣象。從華服錦緞、金釵搖曳的細膩質感，到震撼人心的中國風配樂，全方位呈現極致東方古典美學。由官鴻、黃羿、姚弛、林小宅等知名演員傾情演出。更真實、更驚險刺激的體驗，更宏大的場景、更細膩的人物刻畫，讓盛世不再只存在於螢幕之中，而是於眼前真實展開。您將親身沉浸於「君臨天下」的東方美學盛宴！

● 從默默無聞的少女到傳奇女帝，您的劇本您來寫！
急欲掙脫命運的束縛？在本作品中，您將體驗最驚心動魄的宮廷權謀博弈！從默默無聞的少女，在多方勢力掣肘中突破困局，最終登上權力巔峰。感受運籌帷幄、制衡朝局的帝王智慧，這條逆天改命的稱帝之路，由您親手開創！

● 約1500分鐘真人演繹內容，沉浸體驗帝王人生
匠心打造的《媚娘篇》與《女帝篇》共約1500分鐘的實拍篇章，為您鋪展出一幅波瀾壯闊的盛世畫卷。面對詭譎多變的朝堂局勢，每一次落子、每一句對話，都將引發蝴蝶效應。高張力反轉、重重懸疑……在步步驚心中執掌乾坤，親手改寫王朝命運！
為您情有獨鍾或愛恨交織的角色應援助陣，誰能問鼎全球人氣榜首，皆由您一手掌控。

● 告別旁觀，真正體驗「朕即天下」
屏棄枯燥的點擊對話，深度互動玩法全面升級！權力不再只是一句空洞的台詞，而是您指尖真實運作的朝堂制衡

批閱奏摺：指尖輕點，趣解百態民生。面對層出不窮的新奇提案與市井趣事，看你如何妙筆生花、巧思破局，以奇招惠及萬民。

頒布聖旨：御筆輕懸，執掌群臣榮辱。看你如何恩威並施、論功行賞；透過封賞、發落與追貶，盡顯女帝知人善任的御人之道。

● 您是什麼類型的帝王？專屬人格測驗報告升級
在故事的終點，您還將獲得一份升級版專屬帝王測試報告！深度解析您的權謀風格、危機決策與馭人之道。究竟您是權情兼收、八面玲瓏的「絕命鶴頂紅」，還是至情至性、赴湯蹈火的「風月曼陀羅」，又或是心狠手辣、一心登頂的「卷王見手青」？在故事的最後，看見最真實的自己，並將您的專屬女帝圖鑑分享給全世界！

關於New One Studio

我們是專注於互動敘事的獨立團隊，致力於用創新手法融合東方文化與互動體驗。2019年，是一路同行的大家陪着《隱形守護者》走過 BAFTA 的榮光，更讓我們確信：好的互動敘事，能讓故事住進人心。這幾年，我們一頭栽進了古代盛世，醞釀了一個全新的故事。《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》，不僅為大家呈現東方權謀的「致命」美學，同時帶來考驗智謀與膽識的朝堂博弈。

兩個作品，不同的故事，同一顆初心，希望全球用戶都能在遊玩中再一次感受東方傳統文化的魅力，它將成為跨越文化的橋樑，為每一位支持全動態影像作品的用戶帶來一次全新體驗。

在《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》中，你將親自體驗一代女帝的成長之路。《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》之媚娘篇聚焦於她傳奇的起點——看她如何從默默無聞的少女，在危機四伏的宮廷中步步為營，憑智慧與膽識在險象環生的權力交鋒中存活下來。

在《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇中，你將以執棋者的姿態直面更殘酷的朝堂博弈。運籌帷幄、制衡群臣，在波譎雲詭中開創盛世，親手書寫屬於你的盛世天下！

（橙光正版授權，並感謝橙光音樂支持）

YouTube：https://www.youtube.com/@RoadtoEmpressOfficial
X：https://x.com/roadtoempressen
Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/
Discord：https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

※本遊戲內容涉及暴力，依遊戲軟體分級管理辦法分類為輔15級，十五歲以上之人始得使用。
※本遊戲為付費遊戲，且遊戲內亦另提供購買虛擬遊戲幣、物品等付費服務，請依個人興趣及能力進行適度消費。
※請注意遊戲時間，避免沉迷，長時間進行遊戲，容易影響作息，宜適度休息及運動。
※本遊戲由艾瑞爾網路股份有限公司代理，如有疑問，請以本遊戲客服管道聯繫。

tw.trackCensoredName: This Aint Even Poker, Ya Joker
tw.releaseNotes: - bug fixes
tw.trackName: This Aint Even Poker, Ya Joker
tw.description:
Welcome to This Ain’t Even Poker, Ya Joker - a unique incremental idle clicker where you flip cards to earn money, grow your hand, buy new decks, unlock powerful upgrades, discover new cards, and more. Can you defeat the Jester and escape the carnival?
Steam: Very Positive, 89%

GROW YOUR HAND
Buy new cards to increase your odds of hitting good hands. If you're rich enough, you can even break the rules and get over 5 cards.

ESTABLISH DOMINANCE
Even though the Jester doesn't like it, you can buy new decks of cards in order to play more hands at once. Use this to your advantage to grow those numbers even faster!

GET UPGRADED
Buy powerful upgrades using your hard earned coins, enabling you to progress quicker, open up new avenues, and take on the evil Jester!

GO ON EXPEDITIONS
Once unlocked, you can send your minions on expeditions to discover new otherworldy cards with powerful benefits. Upgrade these missions to provide even more powerful benefits as you progress. You can even unlock missions to destroy cards from your deck that you don't want, to ensure every hand is exactly how you want it.

ASCEND TO GREATNESS
Make a deal with the Jester to start over in exchange for Poker Chips (poker chips? But this ain't even poker...?), use those chips to buy even more powerful upgrades.

ESCAPE THE HOUSE OF CARDS
You're trapped in the Jester's domain, can you manage to defeat him and escape? Or will he keep you there, trapped forever in an endless cycle?

tw.releaseNotes: 修復錯誤與改善效能
tw.description:
Descenders 由知名遊戲 的開發團隊操刀，是一款節奏緊湊的山地自行車下坡競速極限運動遊戲，上手容易，但需要反復挑戰方可成為高手。

極限運動新嘗試
- 隨機產生的地圖:每次挑戰都有全新的跳台、斜坡和急降地形等著你
- 自由式操控體驗:玩家可以控制騎手的任何細微動作，遊戲的深度物理系統可將這些操作化為一次次漂亮的特技動作
- 風險與獎勵:你需要控制騎手向更高更強的分數和特技連招衝刺，但要保證一定的成功率，否則你會輸掉比賽
- 建立你的名望:完善的線上名望系統讓你可以展現自己的實力，並解鎖新的車型和路線
- 完整授權的音樂:我們與知名的鼓打貝斯音樂公司 Liquicity 合作，為你帶來完美的音樂體驗，陪你一同征服山地賽道
- 成為下一個下坡競速王者:你能一鼓作氣通關整條賽道，達到傳奇下坡競速王者的評價嗎？騎上你的愛車開始挑戰吧！
加入車隊，成為傳奇
在《Descenders》，車隊就是車手的一切。玩家選擇加入一支車隊（Enemy、Arboreal 或 Kinetic）後，就需要與隊友一起面對未知的挑戰。

拿上心愛的山地自行車，選擇一個車隊，努力成為傳奇的下坡競速王者吧。你可以選擇頑強而熱衷特技的 Enemy 車隊，技術嫻熟並擅長花式越野的 Arboreal 車隊，或者是充滿熱血，追求極致速度的 Kinetic 車隊。

- 玩家將獲得車隊專用的配色和服裝，以及獨家的裝備
- ]獲得最高名望值的車隊將奪得專屬獎勵
- Descenders Discord 伺服器將為車隊成員開通專用的車隊頻道

tw.trackName: 風光攝影助手Pro:風光攝影計劃好幫手
tw.description:
風光攝影助手Pro 幫助攝影師理解並預判風光攝影中時間、光線與天象之間的關係。

在每一張令人難忘的風光照片背後，都存在著時間、光線與天體運動之間的精準對齊。
真正的挑戰往往不在於按下快門，而是在正確的時間，站在正確的位置，面向正確的方向。

風光攝影助手Pro 的設計目的，就是幫助你理解並預判這些自然節律。
它是一款攝影規劃工具，讓你在出發之前就能評估光線與天體條件，使每一次拍攝都建立在清晰判斷之上，而不是憑運氣等待。

你可以透過時間軸預覽太陽、月亮與銀河在一天中的位置變化。3D 指南針會以直觀的方式顯示它們在空間中的方位與高度，使光線行為不再只是抽象數據。

在 AR 模式 中，你可以在真實環境中預覽太陽、月亮與銀河的未來位置，理解它們與地形及周圍環境的對齊關係。
App 同時清楚顯示重要的天文事件，例如日出、日落、黃金時刻、藍調時刻與各種曙暮光階段，並可將關鍵時間加入系統行事曆以獲得提醒。

風光攝影助手Pro 提供 無限制時間軸，可以預測任何日期與時間的天體位置。同時還提供完整的 AR 創作工具，包括星軌模擬、虛擬取景器預覽、太陽與月亮搜尋、山峰識別以及彗星位置預測。

應用還提供完整的 地圖規劃能力，讓你能在地圖上預測任何位置的拍攝條件，查看光害地圖與天氣預報，並保存與重新載入常用拍攝地點。

此外，風光攝影助手Pro 提供專業級的 3D VR 地形預測系統。
它基於真實高程資料構建，不依賴現場感測器，因此可以在任何地點與時間提供穩定且可重複的預測結果。

你可以模擬地形遮擋、天體運行軌跡以及真實相機視角，幫助你在到達拍攝地之前就確定構圖。

同時，應用也支援在同一套真實 3D 地形環境中進行 無人機構圖模擬。

你可以在起飛前模擬無人機的飛行高度與鏡頭視角，驗證航拍構圖是否可行。

系統會顯示真實的 AGL（Above Ground Level）高度以及與拍攝目標點的水平距離，幫助你在規劃階段評估高度限制與飛行可行性。
此功能僅用於構圖規劃與高度參考，並不判斷空域合法性或禁飛區。

內建的無人機資料庫包含常見消費級機型與相機參數，使模擬結果更接近真實設備表現。

最新版本還引入了 建築對齊規劃系統。

你可以在地圖上放置內建的建築模型，並調整其真實尺寸與方向，從而在 VR 與無人機模擬場景中規劃天體與建築之間的精確對齊構圖。

應用同時支援匯入 .obj 格式的自訂 3D 模型，讓你可以加入自己的地標並用於拍攝規劃。

風光攝影助手Pro 不僅是一個查看資訊的工具，更是一個幫助你做出拍攝決策的工具。

無論是地面機位還是空中機位，它都幫助你在出發之前完成空間推演。

它讓你在拍攝之前更有信心，在現場更加從容，在創作時更加高效。

讓偉大的照片來自準備，而不是偶然。

us.description:
Landscape Photography Helper Pro helps photographers understand and anticipate the alignment of time, light, and celestial motion behind great landscape images.
The real challenge is rarely pressing the shutter—it’s being in the right place, at the right time, facing the right direction.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro is a powerful photography planning tool that allows you to evaluate light and celestial conditions before heading out, so every shoot begins with clarity rather than guesswork.

You can use the timeline to preview the positions of the sun, moon, and Milky Way throughout the day. The 3D compass visualizes their direction and altitude in space, making light behavior intuitive instead of abstract data.

With AR mode, you can preview the future positions of celestial objects directly in your real environment and understand how they align with terrain and surroundings. The app also displays important astronomical events such as sunrise, sunset, golden hour, blue hour, and twilight, and allows you to add key moments to your system calendar for reminders.

The app provides an unlimited timeline, allowing you to predict celestial positions at any date and time. Advanced planning tools include star trail simulation, virtual viewfinder preview, sun and moon search, mountain identification, and comet position prediction.

Comprehensive map planning tools allow you to evaluate shooting conditions at any location. You can view light pollution maps, weather forecasts, and save or reload shooting locations for future planning.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro also includes a professional-grade 3D VR terrain prediction system. Built on real elevation data and independent of on-site sensors, it provides stable and repeatable predictions anywhere.

You can simulate terrain occlusion, celestial paths, and real camera fields of view before arriving on location, helping you finalize compositions in advance.

The app also supports drone composition simulation within the same real 3D terrain environment.

You can simulate drone flight altitude and lens perspective before takeoff to verify whether an aerial composition works.

The system displays real AGL (Above Ground Level) altitude and horizontal distance to your intended composition point, helping you evaluate height constraints and flight feasibility during the planning stage. This feature assists with composition planning only and does not determine airspace legality or restricted flight zones.

An integrated drone database includes common consumer models and camera parameters, allowing simulations to more closely reflect real-world equipment performance.

The latest version also introduces building alignment planning.
Built-in architectural models can be placed anywhere on the map, scaled to real dimensions, and rotated to match their real orientation. This allows you to plan precise alignments between celestial objects and buildings directly inside VR and drone simulation scenes.

You can also import custom .obj 3D models, allowing you to add your own landmarks and use them in planning scenes alongside built-in models.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro is not just a tool for viewing information—it is a tool for making decisions.

It helps you feel confident before shooting, calm on location, and efficient in creation.

Let great photographs be the result of preparation, not chance.

tr.description:
Landscape Photography Helper Pro helps photographers understand and anticipate the alignment of time, light, and celestial motion behind great landscape images.
The real challenge is rarely pressing the shutter—it’s being in the right place, at the right time, facing the right direction.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro is a powerful photography planning tool that allows you to evaluate light and celestial conditions before heading out, so every shoot begins with clarity rather than guesswork.

You can use the timeline to preview the positions of the sun, moon, and Milky Way throughout the day. The 3D compass visualizes their direction and altitude in space, making light behavior intuitive instead of abstract data.

With AR mode, you can preview the future positions of celestial objects directly in your real environment and understand how they align with terrain and surroundings. The app also displays important astronomical events such as sunrise, sunset, golden hour, blue hour, and twilight, and allows you to add key moments to your system calendar for reminders.

The app provides an unlimited timeline, allowing you to predict celestial positions at any date and time. Advanced planning tools include star trail simulation, virtual viewfinder preview, sun and moon search, mountain identification, and comet position prediction.

Comprehensive map planning tools allow you to evaluate shooting conditions at any location. You can view light pollution maps, weather forecasts, and save or reload shooting locations for future planning.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro also includes a professional-grade 3D VR terrain prediction system. Built on real elevation data and independent of on-site sensors, it provides stable and repeatable predictions anywhere.

You can simulate terrain occlusion, celestial paths, and real camera fields of view before arriving on location, helping you finalize compositions in advance.

The app also supports drone composition simulation within the same real 3D terrain environment.

You can simulate drone flight altitude and lens perspective before takeoff to verify whether an aerial composition works.

The system displays real AGL (Above Ground Level) altitude and horizontal distance to your intended composition point, helping you evaluate height constraints and flight feasibility during the planning stage. This feature assists with composition planning only and does not determine airspace legality or restricted flight zones.

An integrated drone database includes common consumer models and camera parameters, allowing simulations to more closely reflect real-world equipment performance.

The latest version also introduces building alignment planning.
Built-in architectural models can be placed anywhere on the map, scaled to real dimensions, and rotated to match their real orientation. This allows you to plan precise alignments between celestial objects and buildings directly inside VR and drone simulation scenes.

You can also import custom .obj 3D models, allowing you to add your own landmarks and use them in planning scenes alongside built-in models.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro is not just a tool for viewing information—it is a tool for making decisions.

It helps you feel confident before shooting, calm on location, and efficient in creation.

Let great photographs be the result of preparation, not chance.

pt.description:
Labyrinth City: Pierre the Maze Detective is an adventure puzzle game for children and adults alike! Adapted from the award-winning children's illustration book series by IC4DESIGN and developed by Darjeeling, Labyrinth City takes you on a trip through a fantastic world of underground cities, hot-air balloons, tree-tops and haunted houses. Find your way through each interactive maze, engage with colorful characters, explore hidden pathways, unlock pieces of clues and solve the mystery along the way.

【The Story】
A new case has arrived for Pierre the Maze Detective! Mr. X has stolen the Maze Stone, which has the power to turn the whole Opera City into a maze. Help Pierre and his friend Carmen find their way through the mazes and stop Mr. X before it's too late!

【The Game】
You play as Pierre, Opera City's renowned maze detective, and you must retrieve the Maze Stone stolen by the notorious thief Mr. X! Without you, Opera City is doomed, as the Maze Stone has the power to turn everything around it into an intricate labyrinth. "Beautiful and cute puzzle games are fine and all," I hear you say, "but what about the challenge?". A fine question! In a maze, although there is only one true path to the exit, there are countless trails to hidden treasures and mini-games. So pay close attention while exploring Opera City and you will be pleasantly surprised. 

【Features】
- Explore Opera City! 
Enter colorful worlds teeming with life and intricate details based on the best-selling children’s book series Pierre the Maze Detective by IC4DESIGN 

- Solve All Mysteries! 
More than 100 hidden objects and unique trophies to find, engaging puzzles and minigames to stimulate your brain 

- Interact With the Surroundings! 
Over 500 interactions possible with the characters, items, and background 

- Relive Childhood Memories! 
Each scene is based on a double-page illustration from the original work 

- Original soundtrack 

- Save the World!
 All levels are tied together by an overarching narration that will fill the detectives within us with purpose 

- Speaks Your Language! 
Available in English, Chinese (simplified and traditional), French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and Russian

pt.description:
Landscape Photography Helper Pro helps photographers understand and anticipate the alignment of time, light, and celestial motion behind great landscape images.
The real challenge is rarely pressing the shutter—it’s being in the right place, at the right time, facing the right direction.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro is a powerful photography planning tool that allows you to evaluate light and celestial conditions before heading out, so every shoot begins with clarity rather than guesswork.

You can use the timeline to preview the positions of the sun, moon, and Milky Way throughout the day. The 3D compass visualizes their direction and altitude in space, making light behavior intuitive instead of abstract data.

With AR mode, you can preview the future positions of celestial objects directly in your real environment and understand how they align with terrain and surroundings. The app also displays important astronomical events such as sunrise, sunset, golden hour, blue hour, and twilight, and allows you to add key moments to your system calendar for reminders.

The app provides an unlimited timeline, allowing you to predict celestial positions at any date and time. Advanced planning tools include star trail simulation, virtual viewfinder preview, sun and moon search, mountain identification, and comet position prediction.

Comprehensive map planning tools allow you to evaluate shooting conditions at any location. You can view light pollution maps, weather forecasts, and save or reload shooting locations for future planning.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro also includes a professional-grade 3D VR terrain prediction system. Built on real elevation data and independent of on-site sensors, it provides stable and repeatable predictions anywhere.

You can simulate terrain occlusion, celestial paths, and real camera fields of view before arriving on location, helping you finalize compositions in advance.

The app also supports drone composition simulation within the same real 3D terrain environment.

You can simulate drone flight altitude and lens perspective before takeoff to verify whether an aerial composition works.

The system displays real AGL (Above Ground Level) altitude and horizontal distance to your intended composition point, helping you evaluate height constraints and flight feasibility during the planning stage. This feature assists with composition planning only and does not determine airspace legality or restricted flight zones.

An integrated drone database includes common consumer models and camera parameters, allowing simulations to more closely reflect real-world equipment performance.

The latest version also introduces building alignment planning.
Built-in architectural models can be placed anywhere on the map, scaled to real dimensions, and rotated to match their real orientation. This allows you to plan precise alignments between celestial objects and buildings directly inside VR and drone simulation scenes.

You can also import custom .obj 3D models, allowing you to add your own landmarks and use them in planning scenes alongside built-in models.

Landscape Photography Helper Pro is not just a tool for viewing information—it is a tool for making decisions.

It helps you feel confident before shooting, calm on location, and efficient in creation.

Let great photographs be the result of preparation, not chance.

Become the boss of your own team, training drivers and acquiring sponsors before conquering the Grand Prix!

Develop new vehicles and parts, and customize them any way you like! Do you have what it takes to make it to the winner's circle?

No knowledge of motorsports is required to play!

--

Note: Screen rotation and zoom are only available on iPhone 3GS and later, iPod touch 2nd generation and later, and iPad.

pt.description:
Build your very own warm and friendly intergalactic city in the cold vacuum of space!
Expect close encounters of the third, fourth, and maybe even fifth kind!

Aim to become the most desirable city in the galaxy by developing land so you can build shops and bases for your residents to live in comfort.
Build Convenience Stores and Parks to make daily life easier, or Takoyaki Stalls and Cinemas to bring in tourists and keep people entertained.
Find the perfect combination of facilities to astronomically boost the city's charm.

As you explore your new world, you'll encounter all kinds of monsters native to the planet.
Stay one step ahead of them by upgrading your Fighter Aircraft and training up your pilots.
And who knows, maybe you'll even make a few new friends along the way!
With the help of your newfound alien friends, hold outdoor events to bring in tourists from all over the galaxy!

Utilize a state-of-the-art autopilot system to help you fight through grueling space battles.
You can also give orders to your pilots to guide them to glorious victory.

So, do you think you have what it takes to build the best city in the entire galaxy?
Jump in the pilot's seat and begin your adventure into the unknown to find out!


--

pt.description:
Projete um shopping de proporções épicas! Atraia multidões de clientes e eleve seu status até as 5 estrelas neste jogo de simulação de gestão de shoppings!

Construa de tudo, de hamburguerias a restaurantes japoneses, de escadas a elevadores — e até mesmo heliportos — tudo com o toque de um dedo!

Quando a popularidade do seu empreendimento alcança um certo patamar, uma "Febre" acontece e seus clientes lotam seu shopping! 

Você pode então assumir o papel de bom cidadão e investir seu recente patrimônio nas áreas ao redor, atraindo ainda mais clientes! É isso aí!

Fique de olho no megaprêmio... Só você pode construir o maior shopping de todos!

Busque "Kairosoft" para ver todos os nossos jogos ou visite-nos em https://kairopark.jp. Conheça tanto os nossos jogos grátis quanto os pagos!

pt.description:
Your favorite dream school simulator is back and better than ever! Introducing: The super fun school festival!

Build facilities and create a great school environment. Set up classrooms, a cafeteria...and a counseling room! (A little nerve-wracking for students to get called in there!)

Place compatible facilities together to create popular spots which will make your school really stand out. As the school's popularity and rep go up, enrollment applications will flood in.

Once you get the hang of things, hold a school festival, complete with fun activities for all!

Get serious about school clubs, too! Once your students get good enough to breeze through practice matches, enter them into the nationals and help them reach that sweet victory. They may even get scouted for their talent!

Help your students prepare for placement tests so they can realize their dreams.

Much sweat and many a tear will be shed as you build your ideal school!

12 years since Pocket Academy, we've perfected the recipe for an exciting school management simulator, packing in lots of new features!

pt.description:
Introducing a sim with real punch!

Are you the manager this down-on-its-luck boxing gym needs to get back on its feet? Get the town excited about boxing, and more people will start signing up.

Stand by the ringside to cheer on your boxers. You never know how a match will go until the very end!

And don't forget about marketing - fans are the lifeblood of competitive sports!

Rack up more wins, and you'll be able to upgrade your facilities with spa baths, high-class cafeterias, and more. Before you know it, athletes will be lining up to join you!

Hire trainers and hone your boxers' skills until they're ready to take on the world!

Make your gym unique by outfitting it with facilities of your choice, creating the perfect environment for fostering boxing talent.

Don't give up until you get that championship belt!

Enjoy all the thrills of an underdog boxing story in Kairosoft's latest management sim game!

--

pt.description:
Lights, camera, action! Get ready to enter the TV industry... Kairosoft style!

In this charming pixel art sim game, you'll create your own shows, deciding everything from the theme and genre down to the set and the performers who star in it. Experiment with different combinations, and you might just have a hit on your hands!

Where would a TV show be without its stars? Build rapport with different talent agencies, find performers that specialize in certain genres, and get the studio audience really fired up!

Preparation is an important part of any production. Send your staff out to scout new locations, and they'll come back with new themes, genres, and decor items, giving you even more options to work with.

Once one show airs, you can start on another right away! Publicize it in magazines, on the radio, or on social media to win new fans. How high will the ratings on your next show be...?

It's time to take control of the airwaves and create a hit that will go down in TV history!

pt.description:
Throw open the gates to a magical kingdom of fun and thrills!

Create and customize your own amusement park. From humble attractions like the teacup ride or trampolines, you'll be able to build up to bigger and better things. You can even hire mascots and hold fantastic parades!

What do your visitors like best? How can you improve? There's no better place to check up-to-the-minute feedback than the park's social media. Work hard, and you might attract the attention of famous online influencers!

Running out of space to build new rides? No problem! Just call your friendly neighborhood construction company to expand the park grounds. Soon you'll be setting up Ferris wheels, roller coasters, and other large-scale attractions to catch the eyes of prospective customers passing by.

Don't forget about mascots - these cute and quirky characters are the first things people will think of when they talk about your park! You'll be able to scout a new mascot every year. Signing one will give you access to special themed areas, like the the Space Zone, Snow Zone, and Desert Zone. Keep increasing your popularity and delight your visitors with spectacular parades!

The more impressed your visitors are, the more points you'll earn. These can be used to research new attractions and fixtures or add new functions to existing ones. Give your fans an experience they'll never forget and work your way up through the rankings!

Take your first step on the roller coaster ride of amusement park management! What kind of park will YOU create?
--
